title: Learning Path for Group Theory Fundamentals
description: A visual guide showing the progression from foundational concepts to advanced topics in Group Theory, including recommended learning resources at each stage.
relationships: Prerequisite knowledge leads to understanding Group Axioms
Axioms are applied to identify Examples of Groups
Examples lead to studying Subgroups and their properties
Subgroups enable understanding of Cosets and Lagrange's Theorem
These concepts combine to define Factor Groups
Homomorphisms/Isomorphisms connect groups throughout the progression
